The six inverted-name ordering relation_types carry the metadata in active config + samples/conception.json; *_supersedes_* (lineage) + data_flow/membership exempt; phase_depends_on unregistered + already authored prerequisite-at-parent. Existing nine task_depends_on_task edges already deriver-canonical so none migrated/dropped/inverted; live deriver blocked output byte-identical pre/post (TASK-005<-004, 018<-016, 019<-015/016/017/018, 021<-020); context-validate stable at 2 pre-existing nested-array warnings. edge-orientation.test.ts (8 tests) asserts write-path normalization, metadata-absent gate, bulk, deriver consumption; orchestrator probe confirmed idempotent dedup post-swap, ordinal preservation, dry-run orientation without write. build+check+full suite green (pi-context 1049 pass/2 skip; all packages 0 fail); parity-check clean.
